validation_commands: cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go build ./...
cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go vet ./...
cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go test ./...

validation_lanes.name: go-build-read-only
validation_lanes.command: cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go build ./...
validation_lanes.purpose: Compile the CLI without RPI runtime side effects.

validation_lanes.name: go-vet-read-only
validation_lanes.command: cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go vet ./...
validation_lanes.purpose: Run static Go analysis without writing repo artifacts.

validation_lanes.name: go-test-read-only
validation_lanes.command: cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go test ./...
validation_lanes.purpose: Run CLI tests without persistent RPI runtime state.

validation_lanes.name: skill-integrity-read-only
validation_lanes.purpose: Validate skill integrity without healing or writing generated files.

validation_lanes.name: worktree-disposition-read-only
validation_lanes.purpose: Classify worktree cleanliness and disposition blockers.

validation_lanes.name: pre-push-fast
validation_lanes.purpose: Run the default fast pre-push gate for changed surfaces.

validation_lanes.name: local-ci-release
validation_lanes.purpose: Run the full local release readiness gate, including artifact-producing release evidence.

predicates: active bead is closed or updated with concrete remaining blockers
validation_commands all pass for landed slices
ao autodev validate reports valid: true for PROGRAM.md
git status is clean for the slice (operator-noted pre-existing dirty files excluded)
new follow-up work discovered during the cycle is tracked in bd
